_meta.note: Drill track DoD ‚Äî N seed ‚Üí M EXACT conversion ratio tiers. ratio = EXACT_count / seed_count.

description: Definition-of-Done tiers for the drill pipeline (smash‚Üífree‚Üíabsolute chain). Each tier requires a minimum EXACT-yield ratio from seed input.

scaffold_done.description: Drill pipeline wired ‚Äî blowup core + absolute module + seed_engine all callable. Yield ratio >= 0.05 (5 EXACT / 100 seeds).

wired_done.description: Chain runnable end-to-end, yield ratio >= 0.15. atlas.n6 receives EXACT appends.
smoke: bash -c 'tail -2000 $NEXUS/n6/atlas.n6 | grep -c EXACT | awk "{ if (\$1 >= 1) exit 0; else exit 1 }"'

serving_done.description: Mature drill ‚Äî yield ratio >= 0.30 sustained over 3 successive runs, promotion to [11*] at least once.
smoke: bash -c 'grep -c "\[11\*\]" $NEXUS/n6/atlas.n6 | awk "{ if (\$1 >= 2) exit 0; else exit 1 }"'
